title: Ending Biomes
description: Adding new biomes to the End dimension
body:
This mod adds 3 new Biomes to the end
1. **Atheria Forest**
   This biome is primarily focused on Magic and Light.

2. **Aoral Plains**
   Danger and harsh climates

3. **Garnit Fields**
   Plains with a lot of acid and powerful crystals with Nano bots

### **You need Geckolib**

*Recommended with sharders*

!!EVERYTHING MADE WITH MCREATOR!!
